name: YBit
developer: Facundo Balboa, Iván Piccione, Martín Díaz
short_description: YBit is a pixelated platformer adventure. You will be playing as a small hero made of information, trying to escape from a program that has crashed. Avoiding errors, not falling down and getting to the exits will be your mission.
detailed_description:
YBit is a pixelated platformer adventure.

About the Game


You will be playing as a small hero made of information, trying to escape from a program that has crashed. Avoiding errors, not falling down and getting to the exits will be your mission.
  • 100 levels
  • Pixel art
  • A background story
  • 16 different types of platforms
  • Full keyboard and joystick support

How to Play


Just move around with the arrows and press space to talk.
